title: WhatsApp automation for booking and launch notification buttons

requirements.text: When a user clicks any 'Book a Session' or booking-related CTA button (e.g., in AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, GSTServicesSection), open WhatsApp (wa.me) in a new tab with a pre-filled message that includes the name of the service/subsidiary selected and a prompt for the user to specify their preferred date/time. The WhatsApp number must be the same one already used in the Footer contact link.

quotes: Whenever they select book a session or something book automate them to my whatsapp with a message of what is selected and when

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking any booking CTA button opens a new tab with a WhatsApp chat URL (https://wa.me/<number>?text=...)
The pre-filled message includes the name of the selected service or subsidiary
The pre-filled message includes a placeholder or prompt for the preferred date and time
The WhatsApp number used matches the existing Footer contact number
All booking buttons across AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, and GSTServicesSection trigger this behavior

requirements.text: When a user clicks the 'Notify Me' button for any upcoming brand card in ComingSoonSection (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue), open WhatsApp (wa.me) in a new tab with a pre-filled message stating that the person wants to be notified for the launch of that specific company (e.g., 'Hi, I would like to be notified about the launch of Luminia Gadgets!'). The WhatsApp number must be the same one already used in the Footer contact link.

quotes: notify it should also open the whatsapp with saying that person wants to get notified for this companies launch

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Notify Me' button for a coming-soon brand opens WhatsApp in a new tab
The pre-filled message includes the specific brand name the user selected
The pre-filled message clearly states intent to be notified of that brand's launch
The WhatsApp number used matches the existing Footer contact number
All three Notify Me buttons (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue) trigger this behavior with their respective brand names

constraints: Use the same WhatsApp number already present in the Footer component — do not introduce a different number
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Open WhatsApp in a new browser tab using wa.me URL scheme with URL-encoded pre-filled text
No backend changes required — this is a pure frontend change
nonGoals: Building a custom booking form or scheduling system
Storing booking or notification requests in the backend
Sending automated messages programmatically via WhatsApp Business API
